summary: Missing budget code does not block normal request submission
steps_to_reproduce: 1. Log in as Maintenance requester; 2. Create standard request without budget code; 3. Attempt normal submission; 4. Review routing status
expected_result: Normal submission is blocked and a clear missing budget code correction message is displayed
actual_result: Request submitted to manager queue with blank budget code and no blocking message

summary: Medium-value request skips finance review after manager approval
steps_to_reproduce: 1. Submit request between CAD 1,000 and CAD 9,999; 2. Approve as department manager; 3. Review next workflow queue
expected_result: Request routes to finance review before procurement review
actual_result: Request moved directly to procurement review after manager approval

summary: Dashboard does not reflect latest finance hold after refresh
steps_to_reproduce: 1. Open approval and exception dashboard; 2. Filter to Maintenance pilot; 3. Compare finance hold count to current synthetic request extract; 4. Review displayed refresh timestamp
expected_result: Dashboard includes latest finance hold status and shows clear refresh timing
actual_result: Dashboard extract did not include latest finance hold status after displayed refresh timestamp
